options.label: B
options.text: I'm going to visit my grandparents this weekend.

options.label: C
options.text: I think it will be sunny.

options.label: D
options.text: The phone is ringing. I'll get it.

exercises.analysis: be going to 表示计划或打算。B 是事先计划好的行程。A 是预测，C 是预测，D 是临时决定。

exercises.stem: Look at those dark clouds. It ___ rain.
exercises.analysis: 根据迹象（乌云）预测用 be going to。will 用于没有明显迹象的预测。
tomorrow 表示将来时间，一般将来时的疑问句用 Will + 主语 + 动词原形。

exercises.stem: We can say: "I am going to will study harder."
exercises.analysis: 不能同时使用 be going to 和 will。要么用 I am going to study，要么用 I will study。

segments: She ___2___ (not go) to the party tonight.
exercises.analysis: next summer 表示将来，可以用 will 或 be going to。否定句用 won't + 动词原形或 be not going to + 动词原形。

exercises.question: 用 will 或 be going to 填空，并说明选择理由：I've just decided. I ___ (buy) a new car.
exercises.referenceAnswer: I will buy a new car. 理由：I've just decided 表示这是临时决定，不是事先计划好的，所以用 will。
scoringPoints: 能区分 will 和 be going to 的用法
